# PPC Guru

> PPC Guru is a Canadian, AI-first Google Partner & Meta Business Partner performance-marketing
> agency based in the Greater Toronto Area (Brampton, Ontario), serving local service businesses
> across Canada and the USA. We turn ad spend into booked jobs and qualified leads through Google
> Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, web design, conversion optimization, creative, CRM and AI automation — with
> daily/weekly optimization and reporting tied to revenue, not vanity metrics.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2021. Led by founders with 10+ years of combined Google Ads experience.
- Credentials: Google Partner, Meta Business Partner.
- Track record (client-reported, blended; representative, not a guarantee): $100M+ ad spend
  managed, 1M+ qualified leads generated, 6.3x average return on ad spend, 500+ businesses served.
- Service area: Greater Toronto Area (Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Vaughan, Markham, Ottawa)
  and across Canada & the USA.
- Founders: Jaydeep Patel (Founder & CEO), Dhaval Patel (Co-founder & Head of Delivery).
- Pricing model: month-to-month, no long-term contracts. Ad spend is separate from management fees.
  Clients own their ad accounts, data and billing.

## Services
- Google Ads Management: https://ppcguru.ca/services/google-ads
- Meta (Facebook & Instagram) Ads: https://ppcguru.ca/services/meta-ads
- SEO & Local Search: https://ppcguru.ca/services/seo
- Microsoft (Bing) Ads: https://ppcguru.ca/services/microsoft-ads
- LinkedIn Ads: https://ppcguru.ca/services/linkedin-ads
- TikTok Ads: https://ppcguru.ca/services/tiktok-ads
- Pinterest Ads: https://ppcguru.ca/services/pinterest-ads
- YouTube Ads: https://ppcguru.ca/services/youtube-ads
- Websites & Landing Pages: https://ppcguru.ca/services/web-design
- Landing Pages & CRO: https://ppcguru.ca/services/cro-landing-pages
- Creative Production: https://ppcguru.ca/services/creative
- AI Automation: https://ppcguru.ca/services/ai-automation
- CRM & Marketing Ops: https://ppcguru.ca/services/crm

## Service-for-industry playbooks (examples)
We publish dedicated pages on running a specific service for a specific vertical — e.g.:
- Google Ads for Law Firms: https://ppcguru.ca/services/google-ads/law-firms
- Google Ads for Dental Practices: https://ppcguru.ca/services/google-ads/dental
- Meta Ads for Real Estate: https://ppcguru.ca/services/meta-ads/real-estate
- SEO for Physiotherapy Clinics: https://ppcguru.ca/services/seo/physiotherapy
- Web Design for Law Firms: https://ppcguru.ca/services/web-design/law-firms
(See the sitemap for all /services/[service]/[industry] combinations.)
